candidates.why: Explicit total revenue line; identical to Net sales in preview and suitable as top-line revenue.
Not revenue; this is COGS.
Direct sales/revenue line; appears to be the primary operating revenue label.

variables.notes: Using revenue priority list to handle possible label changes across years; Net sales preferred over Total Revenue.

candidates.why: Direct cost line tied to revenue generation; appropriate COGS equivalent for a services business.
Explicit standardized COGS label; identical values to Cost of services sold.

candidates.why: Balancing row, not appropriate when actual component/line exists.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit COGS label instead of the balancing row. It matches Cost of services sold in the preview.

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A row; per rule, if explicit SG&A exists and appears populated, select only this row.
Valid SG&A component, but should not be used when a populated explicit SG&A row exists.
Valid SG&A component, but should not be used when a populated explicit SG&A row exists.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Contains depreciation, which must be excluded from XSGA components.

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A row exists and is populated, so selected only that row and excluded depreciation-related row.
No research and development expense line is identifiable in the provided Income Statement. Treat as missing/zero.

candidates.why: Interest-related, but lease interest is only a component and not preferred as the main interest expense line.
Broader finance-cost line; usable fallback if no direct interest expense line is available.
Direct interest expense line and preferred when available.
Lease-specific interest only; not preferred as total interest expense.
Too broad/other; not preferred for pure interest expense.

variables.notes: Added 'Net interest, excl leasing' from the full preview because it appears to be the most semantically correct 2025 interest-expense line, while the candidate list lacks this label. Kept candidate-based fallbacks 'Interest Expense' and then 'Financial expenses' as a priority list for earlier years. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Net interest, excl leasing

candidates.why: Best available equity line on the balance sheet; no separate parent/owners equity line is shown as a complete reported line across years.
Not book equity; this is total balance sheet size.

variables.notes: No clear parent-only equity line is available as a reported total, so Total Equity is used for BE.

Income statement attribution line, not a balance sheet minority equity amount.
Correct concept for balance sheet NCI, but appears unpopulated and no separate NCI amount is evident.
Correct concept for balance sheet minority interest, but appears unpopulated and no separate NCI amount is evident.
